Package microui.core.base

Class ContentView

java.lang.Object
microui.core.base.View
microui.core.base.SpatialView
microui.core.base.ContentView
All Implemented Interfaces:
Visible
Direct Known Subclasses:
Component, TooltipContent
public abstract class ContentView extends SpatialView
Abstract base class for all GUI components that can be displayed and interacted with. Provides padding, margin, shadow effects, and debugging capabilities.

ContentView extends SpatialView to add visual styling and layout spacing features. It manages internal padding (space inside the component) and external margin (space outside the component), and supports shadow effects.

Status: STABLE - Do not modify Last Reviewed: 29.10.2025

See Also:
  • SpatialView
  • AbstractShadow

  • Constructor Details

    • ContentView

      public ContentView(float x, float y, float width, float height)
      Constructs a ContentView with specified position and dimensions.
      Parameters:
      x - the x-coordinate of the component
      y - the y-coordinate of the component
      width - the width of the component
      height - the height of the component

    • ContentView

      public ContentView()
      Constructs a ContentView at origin (0,0) with zero dimensions.

  • Method Details

    • draw

      public void draw()
      Draws the component with shadow effects and debug information. Overrides the parent draw method to add shadow rendering and debug visualization.
      Overrides:
      draw in class SpatialView

    • getShadow

      public final AbstractShadow getShadow()
      Returns the shadow effect applied to this component.
      Returns:
      the shadow effect, or null if no shadow is set

    • setShadow

      public final ContentView setShadow(AbstractShadow shadow)
      Sets a shadow effect for this component.
      Parameters:
      shadow - the shadow effect to apply (cannot be null)
      Returns:
      this ContentView for method chaining
      Throws:
      NullPointerException - if shadow is null

    • setPadding

      public final ContentView setPadding(float paddingHorizontal, float paddingVertical)
      Sets horizontal and vertical padding symmetrically.
      Parameters:
      paddingHorizontal - the horizontal padding (applied to left and right)
      paddingVertical - the vertical padding (applied to top and bottom)
      Returns:
      this ContentView for method chaining

      Sets uniform padding on all sides.

      padding - the padding value for all sides
      Returns:
      this ContentView for method chaining

    • getAbsoluteX

      public final float getAbsoluteX()
      Returns the absolute x-coordinate including margin.
      Returns:
      the x-coordinate minus left padding and left margin

    • getAbsoluteY

      public final float getAbsoluteY()
      Returns the absolute y-coordinate including margin.
      Returns:
      the y-coordinate minus top padding and top margin

    • getAbsoluteWidth

      public final float getAbsoluteWidth()
      Returns the absolute width including padding and margin.
      Returns:
      the width plus padding and margin on both sides

    • getAbsoluteHeight

      public final float getAbsoluteHeight()
      Returns the absolute height including padding and margin.
      Returns:
      the height plus padding and margin on both sides

    • setAbsoluteX

      public final void setAbsoluteX(float x)
      Sets the absolute x-coordinate (including margin).
      Parameters:
      x - the absolute x-coordinate

    • setAbsoluteY

      public final void setAbsoluteY(float y)
      Sets the absolute y-coordinate (including margin).
      Parameters:
      y - the absolute y-coordinate

    • setAbsoluteWidth

      public final void setAbsoluteWidth(float width)
      Sets the absolute width (including padding and margin).
      Parameters:
      width - the absolute width

    • setAbsoluteHeight

      public final void setAbsoluteHeight(float height)
      Sets the absolute height (including padding and margin).
      Parameters:
      height - the absolute height

    • setAbsolutePosition

      public final void setAbsolutePosition(float x, float y)
      Sets the absolute position (including margin).
      Parameters:
      x - the absolute x-coordinate
      y - the absolute y-coordinate

    • setAbsoluteSize

      public final void setAbsoluteSize(float width, float height)
      Resize using margin. this method can change real width and height but it's don't ignore constrain system. Also this method can't modify margin parameters
      Parameters:
      width - change real width with using margin
      height - change real height with using margin

    • setAbsoluteBounds

      public final void setAbsoluteBounds(float x, float y, float width, float height)
      Change bounds using margin. this method can change real bounds, but it's don't ignore constrain system. Also this method can't modify margin parameters
      Parameters:
      x - change position with margin left
      y - change position with margin top
      width - change real width with using margin
      height - change real height with using margin

    • setMarginFrom

      public final void setMarginFrom(ContentView other)
      Copies margin values from another ContentView.
      Parameters:
      other - the ContentView to copy margin from (cannot be null)
      Throws:
      NullPointerException - if other is null
